name: Kronos: Titan of Time
short_description: Kronos: Titan of Time is a Greek Mythology themed 2D combat platformer. Players play as Kronos as they pick up quests, collects resources and upgrade abilities on their epic journey. Battle enemies and control time to uncover the truth behind Kronos’ fall from grace and reclaim his throne.
detailed_description:
Kronos: Titan of Time is an epic 2D combat platformer that immerses players in the journey of the powerful Titan Kronos, as he sets out to reclaim his throne over Olympus. Guided by fate, Kronos must navigate treacherous obstacles and battle fierce enemies using his unique ability to control time.

Along the way, he will encounter a host of characters each with their own stories to tell, as well as opportunities to complete quests and collect valuable resources to upgrade his abilities.

As players progress through the game, they will uncover deeper layers of the story and ultimately discover the truth behind Kronos' fall from grace and his quest to repair what was once right.
